value.body:
## Context

Small teams expect a board for backlog, in-progress, review, and completed work. Cycle already has statuses and saved view concepts that can back this UI.

## Outcome

Users can view and move tickets across status columns in a repository or saved view board.

## Acceptance criteria

- Board columns derive from supported status values and include clear empty states.
- Drag/drop or explicit move controls transition tickets through the existing issue transition endpoint.
- Board respects saved view filters and repository scope.
- Optimistic moves recover cleanly when transition policy rejects a change.
- Tests cover column grouping, transition mutation, and failure rollback.

frontmatter.title: Ship a Kanban board view over tickets and saved views

value.title: Ship a Kanban board view over tickets and saved views
